Onsitego 1 Year Extended Warranty for Small Home & Kitchen Appliances from Rs. 1-500 (Email Delivery - No Physical Kit)
from Onsite Electro Services Private Limited
884
₹115.00
  • EMAIL DELIVERY ONLY: Download your extended warranty certificate by sharing your device details. The link is available under buyer/seller messages at www.amazon.in/msg and is also sent to your Amazon registered email ID
  • REPAIR OR REPLACEMENT GUARANTEE: We will either repair your device or give a replacement. The replacement device will be provided at the discretion of Onsitego on the basis of the depreciated value of your device
  • HASSLE-FREE SERVICE: ‘No Questions Asked’ Repair Policy | Zero-Paperwork Claims Process | Free Pick & Drop or At-Home Service
  • LIMIT OF LIABILITY: Onsitego liability is limited to the depreciated value of the device as detailed in our T&C document
  • HIGH-QUALITY REPAIRS: Service by Onsitego authorised service engineers with high-quality spare parts every single time.
  • EASY TO REQUEST SERVICE: Download the Onsitego app to raise a repair request within 10 seconds or visit our website. You can also call us or chat with us on 99205 99206
  • COVERAGE: The plan covers all defects & malfunctions under the original manufacturer’s warranty. The plan starts the day after the manufacturer’s warranty ends or on the 366th day from the date of device purchase, whichever is later. It does not cover physical or liquid damage, accessories, preventive maintenance or consumables. It also does not cover parts that are not covered under the standard manufacturer’s warranty
  • ELIGIBILITY: The plan can be purchased only for new devices bought on the Amazon platform and WITHIN 30 days of device purchase or before the expiration of the manufacturer's warranty, whichever occurs first. You can purchase this plan only for devices that have AT LEAST 1 Authorised Service Centre anywhere in India. The sum of the manufacturer’s warranty and extended warranty CANNOT EXCEED 5 YEARS. This plan does not cover products or devices purchased or used for COMMERCIAL purposes

        Sorry, something went wrong.

        From the manufacturer

        Technical Specification:

        • This adapter plug modifies electrical outlet, does not change the voltage
        • Supports universal voltage 110V-240V
        • Pen/ Lock Switches, power indicator light
        • Built-in surge protector and a child protection safety shutter

        Features:

        • It has power indicator light and open and lock switches make this lightweight plug an indispensable item in your bag while travelling
        • Allows you to charge your laptop, tablet, Ipad, cell phone and other mobile devices internationally
        • Compact size for easy portability & Accepts earthed/unearthed plugs from dozens of countries
        • LED charging indicator

        Important Note:

        • This charger adapter plug converts the power outlet only, it does not convert electrical output current and voltage
        • Please make sure your device carries an electrical converter when you travel to other countries with different electrical output
        • If your device requires an electrical converter, please pair up the original electrical converter with this world travel charger plug

        How are ratings calculated?
        To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

        Customers say

        Customers find the travel adapter to be of excellent quality and functionality, with one customer noting it works well for mobile and laptop chargers. Moreover, they appreciate its build quality, value for money, and versatility, with one mentioning it works well for daily use. Additionally, the surge protection feature receives positive feedback, with customers noting it provides essential protection for electronic devices. However, the fit and universal compatibility aspects receive mixed reviews - while some say it fits well in sockets and works with different types of plugs, others report issues with the 3-pin plug not fitting snugly.

        • Ishan Dipta
          4 out of 5 stars
          good
          Reviewed in India on 4 February 2026
          Size: Pack Of 1
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          The socket is nice, the build is sturdy, i bough it to protect my laptop against surges, but one important thing i should mention is always use this product in a board with built in fuse or make sure your house has mcb or fuse, as the mov used in this adaptor to protect against surges is supposed to be used with a fuse so that when the mov eventually fails due to repeated surges the fuse will blow open and will stop the failed mov from creating a fire

        • Prabhu Jaganathan
          3 out of 5 stars
          Use it with caution ! Please review below !
          Reviewed in India on 8 August 2025
          Size: Pack Of 1
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          This is my 3rd one. I have been using it for sometime now, Connection fittings inside the plug is solid & the led indicator is an added advantage. Anyone using this to connect multiple appliance have to keep it mind that Overload/Power spike may not only lead to burn the surge protector but also it impacts other connected appliance in this plug.

          Mine got burned out NOT due to external power spike but because of faulty mobile power adapter which I plugged-in( surge protector burned itself to protect the faulty power adapter, power adapter had a minor fault & discharged a power spike). Luckily I was there to turn of the main circuit or else it would have been an huge fire accident.. entire switch board got burned out in a fraction of second’s including fan regulators and other switches).

          Eventually surge protector in this plug is a little electrical component & it WON'T act similar to Voltage stabilizer., if there is a power spike due to thunderstorm or if the connected appliance is faulty then this plug surge protector won’t cut off the current but where as the component gets burned out on it’s own., which is an CRITICAL ISSUE/HAZARD.

          This Multi Plug go well only if there are no power fluctuations/spikes & you are 100% sure of appliance current usage integrity (which you may not aware of the minor defect/discharge visually by looking out appliance from outside all the time ).

          I would personally recommend to go with the model which has built in FUSE feature instead of surge protector component/ICU chip OR without any protectors so that at a worst case the impact would be the least., either just the fuse or the end product not all associated appliances under this plug !

          Read moreRead less
          11 people found this helpful
